text:
There once was a young bunny named Benny. Benny loved adventures. One sunny morning, Benny decided to explore the forest beyond.

He met Polly, a purple pigeon. Polly loved stories. Benny told her about his grand adventure. Together, they planned an expedition into the enchanted forest.

They met Harry, the oldest tree. He told them tales of yesteryears. They spent hours listening before deciding it was nap time.

While resting under the big owl's wings, Benny saw a sparkly thing dangling near. He reached for it but just snagged a leaf!

Returning home, a storm arose. They huddled in Benny's burrow. Raindrops were like little tears.

When calm returned, they saw twinkling lights. Benny's nose twitched. Pirates! But they weren't mean ones.

They played hide-and-seek. Benny loved sneakies. They found silk ties and tossed them. They became capes!

Escape was easy until they bumped into Mr. Crabby. He
